name: Orange Pepper Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Press pepper evenly into both sides of beef steaks.
2. Place on rack in broiler pan so surface of meat is 2 to 3 inches from the heat.
3. Combine marmalade, vinegar and ginger.
4. Brush top of steaks with half of marmalade mixture.
5. Broil steaks for 10 to 15 minutes until rare (140-degrees F.) to medium (160-degree F.), turning once and brushing with remaining marmalade mixture.
6. Serve with steamed new potatoes, microwaved asparagus and baby carrots.
Four servings.
